query: INSERT INTO actions (pdiId, macroId, titulo, descricao, prazo, status, createdAt) VALUES ((SELECT id FROM pdis WHERE colaboradorId = (SELECT id FROM users WHERE email = 'julia@ckmtalents.net' LIMIT 1) LIMIT 1), 1, 'Teste Email', 'Testar fluxo de email', DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL 30 DAY), 'nao_iniciada', NOW());
